meta.title: 3ds Max Course in Yerevan | 3D Modeling School Forma 3D
meta.description: Learn 3D modeling with 3ds Max and Adobe Photoshop at Forma 3D, a 3D modeling course in Yerevan, Armenia. Offline classes, small groups, certificate included.

common.menuDescription: Navigate to a section of the Forma 3D page

hero.description: Forma 3D teaches 3ds Max and Adobe Photoshop in a small offline group. You leave with a finished piece for your portfolio.

groups.title: Small groups
groups.description: Up to {max} students per group, so the instructor has time to check your screen directly.

portfolio.title: Portfolio ready
portfolio.description: Every module ends with a rendered piece you can put in your portfolio.

course.title: One course, four modules
course.description: 3ds Max and Adobe Photoshop, taught in sequence so each module builds on the last. You finish able to model, light, render, and retouch a scene end to end.

modeling.title: Modeling
modeling.description: Poly modeling and modifiers in 3ds Max, from primitives to a finished object.

materials.title: Materials and lighting
materials.description: Physical materials, UVs, and scene lighting that reads correctly at render time.

rendering.title: Rendering
rendering.description: Camera setup, render settings, and passes you can control instead of guess at.

post.title: Photoshop post-production
post.description: Color correction, compositing, and the retouching pass that turns a render into a portfolio piece.

facts.title: What you are signing up for
facts.description: No hidden requirements. This is the group size, the length of the course, and what you walk away with.

how.title: From application to your first class
how.description: Four steps, no waiting room. Most applicants hear back within a day.

apply.title: Submit the form
apply.description: Fill in the pre-registration form below with your name, phone, and email.

call.title: We call you
call.description: Our team calls to confirm the group, the schedule, and answer any questions.

confirm.title: Confirm your seat
confirm.description: Pay {price} AMD to reserve your place in the next group.

start.title: Start the course
start.description: Show up to your first session and start modeling in week one.

faq.title: Questions people actually ask
faq.description: If your question is not here, contact us directly and we will answer it before you register.

experience.question: Do I need prior 3D experience?
experience.answer: No. The course starts from the 3ds Max interface and basic modeling. If you can use a computer comfortably, you can start.

software.question: Do I need to buy 3ds Max and Photoshop myself?
software.answer: You need access to both during the course. We can point you to student licensing options when you enroll.

schedule.question: What is the weekly schedule?
schedule.answer: Classes run {sessions} times a week, {hours} hours per session, at our studio in Yerevan.

groupSize.question: How many people are in a group?
groupSize.answer: Up to {max} students. We keep groups small so everyone gets time with the instructor.

certificate.question: Do I get a certificate?
certificate.answer: Yes, a Forma 3D certificate once you complete all four modules and your final piece.

payment.question: How much does the course cost, and can I pay in parts?
payment.answer: The course is {price} AMD. Ask about installment options when you speak with our team after registering.

cta.title: Seats are limited per group
cta.description: Pre-register now to hold a spot in the next intake. We will call you to confirm before you pay anything.

contact.title: Talk to us before you enroll
contact.description: Call, message us on Instagram, or come by the studio. We are happy to answer questions before you register.

register.title: Pre-register for the next group
register.description: Leave your details and we will call you to confirm your seat. No payment is required to pre-register.

consent.label: I agree to the {link} and consent to being contacted about my application

errors.consent: You must agree to the privacy policy to continue
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us directly.

success.title: Application received
success.description: You will receive a confirmation email at the address you provided. We will call you soon to confirm your seat.

footer.blurb: Forma 3D is an offline 3D modeling school in Yerevan, teaching 3ds Max and Adobe Photoshop in small groups.

meta.title: Privacy Policy for the Forma 3D Pre-Registration Form
meta.description: How Forma 3D collects, uses, and stores the personal information you submit through the pre-registration form on this website, and how to reach us about it.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what information Forma 3D collects through this website, why we collect it, and how you can contact us about it.

dataCollected.title: What we collect
dataCollected.body: When you submit the pre-registration form, we collect your full name, phone number, email address, and the course you selected.

purpose.title: Why we collect it
purpose.body: We use this information to contact you about your application, confirm your seat in a group, and send you a confirmation email.

retention.title: How long we keep it
retention.body: We keep your application details for as long as needed to process your enrollment, and no longer than two years after your last contact with us.

thirdParties.title: Who sees it
thirdParties.body: Your details are used by Forma 3D staff only. We do not sell or share your information with third parties for marketing.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can ask us to show you, correct, or delete the information we hold about you at any time by contacting us.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: For any question about your data, write to info{'@'}forma3d.am or call +374 55 123 456.

courses.title: One course open, two on the way
courses.description: We run small groups and only open a course once the program is finished. Here is what is running now and what comes next.

threeDsMax.title: 3ds Max and Adobe Photoshop
threeDsMax.description: Model, light, and render interiors and objects from scratch, then finish the image in Photoshop. Four modules, each ending with a piece for your portfolio.

archviz.title: Architectural Visualization
archviz.description: Exterior scenes, daylight studies, and presentation boards for architects and interior designers.

gamedev.title: Game Dev Modeling
gamedev.description: Low poly modeling, UV unwrapping, and baking for assets that run inside a game engine.
